response.justification: The candidate shows broad engineering experience across multiple languages and domains but lacks focused, demonstrable expertise in Java/Kotlin, JVM internals, Spring ecosystem, or enterprise IDE tooling — all critical for this role. Their Java exposure is minimal and buried in older roles, with no evidence of deep IDE or language tooling work, making them a poor fit despite strong generalist skills.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops
Proven ability to own complex systems and build developer tooling
concerns: Minimal recent or deep Java/Kotlin experience; no evidence of JVM tooling work
No demonstrable involvement with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise IDEs
Primary tech focus is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM-based enterprise tooling
